ops.body: Shipped as cc-notes plugin 0.11.0 (commit 42a5a3cca6d3; released in cc-notes v0.30.0 so capt-hook's @latest pack source serves it — the resolver reads GitHub releases/latest, NOT main; the release cut was a required extra step). IMPLEMENTATION NOTE vs this task's description: the hook is a DECLARATIVE hook() warn, not nudge(max_fires=None) — capt-hook 9.10.0's dispatch skips handler-backed hooks (all nudges) once a block fires, so only a declarative warn pairs with the general-pack deny. Live e2e proof via real dispatch (uvx --isolated capt-hook@9.10.0 run PreToolUse, scratch repo, fleet packs.toml): go 5-line run → deny containing the Verbose-comment block + "Additional advisories" separator + the cc-notes redirect; 6-line rustdoc → allow with redirect + doc warn as additionalContext; untouched legacy 8-line run → clean allow; density warn at 62.5%, quiet at exactly 50%; comment-free edits → no advisory spam. Resolver verified fetching latest@42a5a3c v0.30.0 (9 hooks). Dependency floor >=9.10.0 still rides with task 215f9ce.
